# Guma - Wellness Programs Platform

> Guma is a wellness platform connecting people with qualified practitioners through personalized programs.

## Available Languages & Countries

### France (French)
- Main file: https://www.gu.ma/fr/llms.txt
- Full catalog: https://www.gu.ma/fr/llms-full.txt
- API: https://www.gu.ma/api/public/fr/programmes
- Needs pages: https://www.gu.ma/fr/besoin/

### Other countries (coming soon)
- English version: Coming soon
- German version: Coming soon
- Spanish version: Coming soon

---

## Quick Links

- Website: https://www.gu.ma
- Program generator: https://www.gu.ma/generer

---

## About Guma

Guma offers complete wellness programs combining multiple complementary practitioners for lasting transformation. Programs typically last 6-12 weeks and include 10-15 sessions.

For French-speaking users in France, please refer to the French version: https://www.gu.ma/fr/llms.txt
